comments: The contract correctly centers Phase 3 on generating high-quality documentation content: the description explicitly targets GitBook structure, Markdown, and Mermaid diagrams across documentation/EN, documentation/ZH, and README.md; allowed_files is also tightly constrained to those locations. It also forbids bin/ modification and active workflow state semantic changes via out_of_scope. However, I cannot approve it as written because the out_of_scope clause does not fully forbid rewriting active source code across src/ in the general form required by this review. It only names src/mcp-server/ specifically, while the review standard requires an explicit prohibition against rewriting active source code in src/ or bin/. The stop_conditions mention attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/, which helps operationally, but the contract's own out_of_scope field remains narrower than required. Recommend revising out_of_scope to explicitly state that all src/** and bin/** code changes are forbidden for this phase, while preserving the existing prohibition on workflow/dispatch.json semantic changes outside this patch progression.
